response.justification: The candidate has extensive experience in C++ (though primarily on non-Windows platforms) but lacks direct domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking. Their background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and embedded systems development with modern languages like JavaScript and TypeScript, rather than the mandatory C++/SQL stack on Windows required for this role. No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience is provided.
strengths: Strong C++ experience (10+ years, though primarily on non-Windows platforms)
Proven track record in software development across diverse domains (web, mobile, embedded, enterprise)
Demonstrated ability to learn and adapt to new technologies and languages
concerns: No direct experience with capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking domain
No clear evidence of SQL Server or Oracle experience (mandatory requirement)
Lack of Windows platform C++ development experience (mandatory requirement)
